case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS CRUZ, TEODORO T.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $829.62 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, TEODORO T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, TEODORO T.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, TEODORO T. $829.62 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $871.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $200.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $34.59 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, TEODORO T.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, TEODORO T.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $747.79 AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, TEODORO T.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, TEODORO T.
